name: First Bank
description_short: Mccomb, MS – First Bank at 105 S Broadway St offers convenient banking services.
description_long:
The First Bank branch in Mccomb, MS is located at 105 S Broadway St, operating as a full-service banking facility in the downtown area. This dedicated location serves the banking needs of Mccomb residents and local businesses.

At the Mccomb branch, customers can access comprehensive banking services including checking and savings accounts, deposits, withdrawals, and general financial services. For current information about available products and services at this Mccomb location, customers should contact the branch directly.

When banking at this Mccomb location, bring a valid photo ID for account verification and transactions. The 105 S Broadway St branch in Mccomb provides convenient access for your banking needs in the downtown area. First Bank delivers reliable local banking services to the Mccomb community.
services: Club Checking personal accounts with comprehensive features
Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) for multiple uses
Credit card products and statement login access
Card Verifi™ debit card fraud protection
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Comprehensive Money School financial education program with multiple partner resources (Banzai, FDIC Money Smart, FIS)
Card Verifi™ debit card fraud protection service included
Quick Switch Kit for seamless account transfer from competitor banks
Home Equity Line of Credit with flexible payment options for home improvement and debt consolidation
Active community involvement with event sponsorships and financial literacy teaching in schools
Online and mobile banking capabilities with account management features
Small-dollar, short-term loans with quick online application process
cons: Website does not disclose specific fee structures, interest rates, APRs, or loan terms for comparison
Limited to regional availability primarily in Mississippi, restricting branch access and service areas
No mention of investment accounts, wealth management, or business banking services
Lacks transparency about minimum deposit requirements, account opening specifications, and product eligibility criteria
No discussion of CD rates, savings account APY, or competitive positioning versus national banks
best_for: Mississippi residents seeking community-focused banking with local branch relationships
Customers prioritizing financial education and literacy resources for personal finance management
Homeowners interested in Home Equity Lines of Credit for consolidation or home improvement projects
Consumers switching from other banks who value simplified account transition assistance
diagnosis: First Bank is best suited for Mississippi-area consumers seeking traditional FDIC-insured banking with community values and strong financial education resources. The primary caveat is lack of transparent fee and rate disclosure on the website, requiring direct contact for specific pricing, and limited geographic reach outside the Mississippi market may restrict accessibility for mobile or multi-state customers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Mccomb, MS – First Bank at 105 S Broadway St. Convenient banking services.
